description: Phase 1 protected-path baseline. git blob SHA-1 (git hash-object) per file at the committed HEAD when the daily integrity check was set up. The 7am check compares these against the current GitHub HEAD of each repo. Any change = drift to flag.
note_revision: Updated 2026-06-11 post hygiene-cleanup merge. fortress main=75d9d97 (dead-code removal, test-collection guards tests/optional_deps.py+__init__.py, CI workflow, doc/config sync). trading master=47c6a6b (dead analyst/log code removed, CI, .env.example docs). Protected blobs UNCHANGED on both. Phases 1-3, issues #1-#5, and hygiene pass all verified clean + merged. Safety rails fully in force.
